articles.title: Sunny Optical Technology Group SEHK 2382 Valuation After Strong Full Year Results And Higher Dividend
articles.summary: Sunny Optical Technology (Group) (SEHK:2382) drew investor attention after reporting full year 2025 results, with sales of CN¥43,229.13m, net income of CN¥4,639.11m, and an annual dividend of HK$1.2060 per share. See our latest analysis for Sunny Optical Technology (Group). The earnings release appears to have reset expectations, with a 1 day share price return of 5.18% and a 7 day return of 11.44%, even though the 1 year total shareholder return of 13.24% and 5 year total shareholder return...
